mention.text: @cursorsupport paying customer here. i emailed support 2 days ago and got no confirmation. also how do i switch to annual without canceling my next monthly renewal?

triage.summary: User (paying customer) reports no confirmation after emailing support for 2 days, and asks how to switch from monthly to annual without canceling their next monthly renewal. Policy source indicates mid-plan switching isn’t supported and that changes should be scheduled via the Adjust plan flow.

suggested_response: Route to human billing support to (1) look up the user’s prior email ticket and confirm status/confirmation delivery, and (2) verify the exact monthly→annual scheduling behavior in the Adjust plan flow from the dashboard for this account. Use pricing-doc guidance: mid-plan switching isn’t supported; plan changes are scheduled via Adjust plan rather than cancel/restart.
suggested_reply: Cursor doesn’t support switching plans mid-cycle. To move from monthly to annual without canceling your next monthly renewal, use the Adjust plan flow in your billing dashboard so the switch is scheduled for the end of your current billing period. Since you haven’t received a confirmation from your earlier email, please contact hi@cursor.com so the team can locate your ticket and update you.

link to post: https://x.com/annualswitch/status/email-slow-annual-switch
sources: https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/pricing, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/billing, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/cancel

fallback.reason: The sources provided don’t explicitly spell out monthly→annual timing without canceling the next renewal, and there’s no documentation coverage for missing/no email confirmations. A human should verify the exact scheduling behavior in the Adjust plan flow and check the prior ticket status.
fallback.manual_next_step: Ask a human to: (a) find the user’s prior support email/ticket and send a confirmation/update, and (b) confirm the exact “effective date” behavior when switching monthly→annual via Adjust plan (so the next renewal remains intact).
